text:
Detection: No security vendors flagged this file as malicious
File: skill.zip  Size  8.60 KB
Last analysis: 2026-02-13 06:29 UTC
Code insights: Type: OpenClaw Skill
Name: who-growth-charts
Version: 1.2.1

The skill is benign. It downloads necessary WHO reference data and an emblem from `cdn.who.int`, which are legitimate sources for its stated purpose of generating growth charts. The script includes robust path sanitization (`_safe_filename`) and input/output path validation (`_safe_input_path`) to prevent directory traversal and restrict file operations to the designated workspace or standard temporary directories (`/tmp`, `TMPDIR`). There is no evidence of data exfiltration, unauthorized command execution, persistence mechanisms, or prompt injection attempts in `SKILL.md` or the Python code. All network and file system interactions are aligned with the skill's described functionality.
